title: Jury costs; demand by municipal corporation
doc_html:
§116.  Jury costs; demand by municipal corporation

If the municipal corporation has demanded a jury trial to determine compensation, the costs of the jury trial shall be assessed against the municipal corporation.  

Acts 1990, No. 133, §2.
